#+title: Emacs From Scratch Configuration
#+STARTUP: content
#+PROPERTY: header-args:emacs-lisp :tangle ./init.el :mkdirp yes

* Startup Performance
** Ignore Annoying Message 
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  ;;; init.el --- Generated by Emacs.org
  ;;; Commentary:
  ;; NOTE: init.el is now generated from Emacs.org.  Please edit that file
  ;;       in Emacs and init.el will be generated automatically!
  (setq warning-suppress-types '((comp) (native-comp)))
  (setq inhibit-startup-message t)
  (defalias 'yes-or-no-p 'y-or-n-p)
#+end_src
** Measure Loading Time Performance
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  ;; The default is 800 kilobytes.  Measured in bytes.
  ;; 启动时提高 GC 阈值以加速加载，启动完成后降回合理值，
  ;; 避免长时间不 GC 导致单次回收时 Emacs 卡顿数百毫秒
  (setq gc-cons-threshold (* 128 1000 1000))

  (add-hook 'emacs-startup-hook
            (lambda ()
              (setq gc-cons-threshold (* 16 1000 1000))))

  (defun bc/display-startup-time ()
    (message "Emacs loaded in %s with %d garbage collections."
	     (format "%.2f seconds"
		     (float-time
		      (time-subtract after-init-time before-init-time)))
	     gcs-done))

  (add-hook 'emacs-startup-hook #'bc/display-startup-time)
#+end_Src


* Package System Setup
** Straight.el
straight.el: next-generation, purely functional package manager for the Emacs
hacker.

#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  (defvar bootstrap-version)
  (let ((bootstrap-file
	 (expand-file-name
	  "straight/repos/straight.el/bootstrap.el"
	  (or (bound-and-true-p straight-base-dir)
	      user-emacs-directory)))
	(bootstrap-version 7))
    (unless (file-exists-p bootstrap-file)
      (with-current-buffer
	  (url-retrieve-synchronously
	   "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/radian-software/straight.el/develop/install.el"
	   'silent 'inhibit-cookies)
	(goto-char (point-max))
	(eval-print-last-sexp)))
    (load bootstrap-file nil 'nomessage))
  ;;By default, use-package uses package.el to install packages
  ;;To configure use-package to always use straight.el, use use-package to configure straight.el
  ;;to turn on straight-use-package-by-default.
  (use-package straight
    :ensure nil
    :custom
    (straight-use-package-by-default t))

#+end_src


* Basic Setup
** PATH
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  (use-package exec-path-from-shell
    :if (not (eq system-type 'windows-nt))
    :straight t
    :config
    ;; 始终初始化 PATH，不限于 GUI 模式。
    ;; daemon 模式或纯终端下  display-graphic-p 为 nil，
    ;; 但 Emacs 仍然需要完整的 shell PATH 才能找到 LSP server 等工具
    (exec-path-from-shell-initialize))

#+end_src
** Keep Folders Clean
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  (use-package no-littering
    :straight t
    :config
    (require 'recentf)
    (add-to-list 'recentf-exclude no-littering-var-directory)
    (recentf-mode 1)

    ;; no-littering doesn't set this by default so we must place
    ;; auto save files in the same path as it uses for sessions
    (setq auto-save-file-name-transforms
	  `((".*" ,(no-littering-expand-var-file-name "auto-save/") t)))

    ;; Emacs will save customizations into your init.el file by default. If you don't
    ;; want that, you might want to store them in a sibling file or even in the etc/
    ;; directory:

    (setq custom-file (no-littering-expand-etc-file-name "custom.el"))
    )
  (setq make-backup-files nil)
#+end_src

use the no-littering package to keep folders where we edit files and the Emacs
configuration folder clean! It knows about a wide variety of variables for built
in Emacs features as well as those from community packages so it can be much
easier than finding and setting these variables yourself.

** Completion FrameWork
#+begin_src emacs-lisp

  ;; Basic completion frame work backend, like server
  (use-package vertico
    :straight t
    :init (vertico-mode)
    :config
    ;; 让 Evil 用户在 minibuffer 里也能用 C-j / C-k 移动
    (define-key vertico-map (kbd "C-j") 'vertico-next)
    (define-key vertico-map (kbd "C-k") 'vertico-previous)
    ;; 配合 Evil 的跳转习惯，进入目录或选中直接回车
    (define-key vertico-map (kbd "C-l") 'vertico-insert))

  (use-package ripgrep
    :straight t
    )

  (use-package consult
    :straight t
    :bind (;; 1. 快速预览当前文件的函数/符号 (代替 imenu)
           ("M-s i" . consult-imenu)
           ;; 2. 全局搜索 (配合 ripgrep)，对 U-Boot 这种大工程是刚需
           ("M-s g" . consult-ripgrep) 
           ;; 3. 实时预览的行搜索 (代替 Swiper)
           ("C-s" . consult-line)
           ("C-x b" . consult-buffer))
    )

  ;; Emacs Corfu (Completion Overlay Region FU) 是一个用于 Emacs 的补全框架，
  ;; 它提供了一种新的用户界面来显示补全候选项。Corfu 是 Emacs的一个外部包，
  ;; 它致力于提供一种直观且高效的补全体验。以下是一些 Corfu 的主要特性和功能：
  (use-package corfu
    :straight t
    :custom
    (corfu-auto t)
    (corfu-auto-delay 0.1) ; 嵌入式开发需要更快的响应
    :init
    (global-corfu-mode)
    )

  ;; 解决终端下 Corfu 不显示弹窗的问题
  (use-package corfu-terminal
    :straight t
    :config
    ;; 只在非图形界面（终端）下开启
    (unless (display-graphic-p)
      (corfu-terminal-mode +1)))

  ;; Optionally use the `orderless' completion style.
  (use-package orderless
    :custom
    ;; Configure a custom style dispatcher (see the Consult wiki)
    ;; (orderless-style-dispatchers '(+orderless-dispatch))
    ;; (orderless-component-separator #'orderless-escapable-split-on-space)
    (completion-styles '(orderless basic))
    (completion-category-defaults nil)
    (completion-category-overrides '((file (styles basic partial-completion)))))

  (use-package cape
    :straight t
    :init
    ;; 将常用的补全后端加入到 capf 列表中
    (add-to-list 'completion-at-point-functions #'cape-file)      ; 文件路径补全
    (add-to-list 'completion-at-point-functions #'cape-keyword)   ; 编程语言关键字
    (add-to-list 'completion-at-point-functions #'cape-dabbrev)   ; 当前 buffer 已有的词
      )
#+end_src
** Copy Vterm
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  ;; 在你的 .emacs 或 init.el 中添加
  (defun copy-from-emacs-to-vterm ()
    (let ((inhibit-read-only t))
      (with-temp-buffer
        (insert (current-kill 0))
        (shell-command-on-region (point-min) (point-max) "printf \"\\e]52;c;%s\\a\" \"$(base64 | tr -d '\\n')\""))))

  (add-hook 'kill-ring-save-hook 'copy-from-emacs-to-vterm)

#+end_src
** Daemon & File Sync
这些配置是 Emacs 与外部工具（git、Claude Code 等 CLI 工具）协同工作的基础。
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  ;; 开启 daemon 支持，允许 emacsclient 连接
  ;; 外部工具通过 EDITOR="emacsclient -c -a ''" 可在当前 Emacs 中打开文件
  (server-start)

  ;; 文件被外部工具修改后自动刷新 buffer（git checkout、Claude Code 编辑等）
  (global-auto-revert-mode 1)

  ;; 持久化 minibuffer 历史（vertico/consult 的选择记录）
  (savehist-mode 1)

  ;; 记住上次离开文件时的光标位置
  (save-place-mode 1)
#+end_src

*** Hightlight
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  ;; -------- 非 GUI 相关的全局设置（终端和 GUI 都生效）--------
  (setq visible-bell t)
  (display-time-mode 1)
  (column-number-mode)
  (global-display-line-numbers-mode t)

  ;; -------- GUI 外观变量定义 --------
  (defvar my/frame-transparency '(95 . 95))
  (defvar my/default-font-size 160)
  (defvar my/default-variable-font-size 160)

  ;; -------- GUI 外观设置函数（daemon 模式兼容）--------
  ;; 将 GUI 相关初始化放入 after-make-frame-functions hook，
  ;; 确保 daemon 模式下 emacsclient -c 创建窗口时也能正确配置外观。
  (defun my/setup-gui-frame (frame)
    "Apply GUI-specific settings to FRAME."
    (with-selected-frame frame
      (when (display-graphic-p)
        ;; 禁用 GUI 元素
        (scroll-bar-mode -1)
        (tool-bar-mode -1)
        (tooltip-mode -1)
        (menu-bar-mode -1)
        (set-fringe-mode 10)

        ;; 主题
        (load-theme 'wombat t)

        ;; 透明度
        (set-frame-parameter nil 'alpha my/frame-transparency)

        ;; 字体 (https://www.fontsquirrel.com/fonts)
        (set-face-attribute 'fixed-pitch nil :font "JetBrains Mono" :height my/default-font-size)
        (set-face-attribute 'default nil :font "JetBrains Mono" :height my/default-font-size)
        (set-face-attribute 'variable-pitch nil :font "Source Sans Pro" :height my/default-variable-font-size :weight 'regular))))

  ;; daemon 模式下新创建的 GUI frame 会自动调用
  (add-hook 'after-make-frame-functions #'my/setup-gui-frame)

  ;; 非 daemon 模式（直接启动 GUI Emacs）时主动调用一次
  (when (display-graphic-p)
    (my/setup-gui-frame (selected-frame)))

  ;; 平台相关的 frame 尺寸（使用 default-frame-alist 以兼容 daemon 模式）
  (cond
   ((eq system-type 'darwin)
    (setq default-frame-alist '((top . 10)
                                (left . 60)
                                (width . 85)
                                (height . 50))))
   ((eq system-type 'windows-nt)
    (setq default-frame-alist '((top . 10)
                                (left . 10)
                                (width . 100)
                                (height . 45))))
   (t
    (message "for other system")))

  ;; 透明度追加到 default-frame-alist（在 cond 之后，避免被 setq 覆盖）
  (add-to-list 'default-frame-alist `(alpha . ,my/frame-transparency))
  ;; (add-to-list 'default-frame-alist '(fullscreen . maximized))

  ;; unicode-fonts 会加载大量字体配置，启动时间影响显著（~0.5-1s）。
  ;; 已使用 nerd-icons + JetBrains Mono（内置大量 Unicode 字形），
  ;; 一般不需要 unicode-fonts。如需使用，取消下面的注释：
  ;; (use-package unicode-fonts
  ;;   :straight t
  ;;   :config
  ;;   (unicode-fonts-setup))

  (use-package dimmer
      :straight t)
  (require 'dimmer)
  (dimmer-configure-which-key)
  (dimmer-mode t)

  (use-package diff-hl
    :straight t)
  (global-diff-hl-mode)

#+end_src

*** Theme
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  ;; 主题加载已移至 my/setup-gui-frame 函数中（见 Hightlight 节），

#+end_src


* Programing
** Eglot
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  (require 'eglot)
  (setq eldoc-echo-area-use-multiline-p nil)
  #+end_src
** LSP
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  (use-package rustic
    :straight t
    :config
    (setq rustic-lsp-client 'eglot))

  (add-to-list 'auto-mode-alist '("CMakeLists\\.txt\\'" . cmake-mode))
  (add-to-list 'auto-mode-alist '("\\.cmake\\'" . cmake-mode))

  ;; -------- verilog mode --------
  (use-package verilog-mode
    :ensure t
    :mode ("\\.v\\'" "\\.sv\\'"))

  ;; -------- eglot --------
  (use-package eglot
    :ensure t
    :hook (verilog-mode . eglot-ensure))

  ;; 告诉 eglot 用 svls
  (add-to-list 'eglot-server-programs
               '(verilog-mode . ("verible-verilog-ls")))

  ;; -------- format (verible) --------
  (defun my/verilog-format-buffer ()
    (interactive)
    (when (executable-find "verible-verilog-format")
      (call-process-region
       (point-min) (point-max)
       "verible-verilog-format"
       t (current-buffer) nil)))

  ;; 手动格式化快捷键
  ;; (with-eval-after-load 'verilog-mode
  ;;  (define-key verilog-mode-map (kbd "C-c C-f")
  ;;	      #'my/verilog-format-buffer))

  (with-eval-after-load 'eglot 
    (cond
     ;; macOS 设置 (使用 MacPorts 安装的 clangd)
     ((eq system-type 'darwin)
      (add-to-list 'eglot-server-programs '(c-mode . ("/opt/local/bin/clangd-mp-20")))
      (add-to-list 'eglot-server-programs '(c++-mode . ("/opt/local/bin/clangd-mp-20"))))
     
     ;; Linux 设置
     ((eq system-type 'gnu/linux)
      (add-to-list 'eglot-server-programs '(c-mode . ("/usr/bin/clangd")))
      (add-to-list 'eglot-server-programs '(c++-mode . ("/usr/bin/clangd"))))
     
     ;; 默认 fallback 设置（如 Windows 或未知平台）
     (t
      (add-to-list 'eglot-server-programs '(c-mode . ("clangd")))
      (add-to-list 'eglot-server-programs '(c++-mode . ("clangd")))))) 

  (add-to-list 'eglot-server-programs
               '(python-mode . ("pyright-langserver" "--stdio")))

  ;; hook eglot to c python mode
  (dolist (mode '(c-mode c++-mode python-mode))
    (add-hook (intern (concat (symbol-name mode) "-hook"))
      	    #'eglot-ensure))

  (use-package ggtags
    :straight t
    :hook ((c-mode c++-mode asm-mode) . ggtags-mode))

  (use-package blacken
      :straight t
      :hook (python-mode . blacken-mode)
      :config
      (setq blacken-line-length 79))
#+end_src

** Linter
#+begin_src emacs-lisp

  (setq flymake-no-changes-timeout nil) ;; 避免自动触发，不干扰打字
  (setq flymake-start-on-save-buffer t)
  (setq flymake-start-on-flymake-mode t)

  (add-hook 'prog-mode-hook 'flymake-mode)

  ;; 在 minibuffer 中显示当前光标下的诊断信息
  (defun flymake-show-diagnostic-if-needed ()
    (when-let ((diags (flymake-diagnostics (point) (point))))
      (message "%s"
               (mapconcat (lambda (diag)
                            (flymake-diagnostic-text diag))
                          diags "\n"))))

  ;; 使用 idle timer 代替 post-command-hook，只在 Emacs 空闲时触发诊断查询，
  ;; 避免每次按键都执行，减少大文件 + LSP 场景下的输入延迟
  (run-with-idle-timer 0.5 t #'flymake-show-diagnostic-if-needed)

#+end_src




* Keymap
** Evil Mode
Evil is an extensible vi layer for Emacs. It emulates the main features of Vim,
turning Emacs into a modal editor. Like Emacs in general, Evil is extensible in
Emacs Lisp.

#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  (setq evil-want-integration t)
  (setq evil-want-keybinding nil)

  (use-package evil
    :straight t
    :config
    (evil-mode 1)
    
    ;; 快速退出插入模式
    (define-key evil-insert-state-map (kbd "C-g") 'evil-normal-state)
    
    ;; 屏蔽掉默认的 C-z 挂起，防止在 tmux 里误触
    (define-key evil-normal-state-map (kbd "C-z") nil)
    (define-key evil-motion-state-map (kbd "C-z") nil))

  (use-package evil-collection
    :after evil
    :straight t
    :config
    (evil-collection-init))

  (with-eval-after-load 'org
  (evil-define-key 'normal org-mode-map
    (kbd "TAB") #'org-cycle
    (kbd "<tab>") #'org-cycle
    (kbd "S-TAB") #'org-shifttab))
  
  (use-package general
    :straight t
    :config
    (general-evil-setup)
    ;; 定义你的 Leader Key 逻辑
    (general-create-definer my/leader-keys 
      :keymaps '(normal insert visual emacs)
      :prefix "SPC"
      :global-prefix "C-SPC")
    
    (my/leader-keys

      ;; xref (LSP-based): 适用于有 compile_commands.json + clangd/pyright 的项目
      ;; 定义跳转 / 引用查找均通过 LSP server，无需额外索引
      "cd" '(xref-find-definitions :which-key "Jump to Definition (LSP)")
      "cu" '(xref-find-references  :which-key "Find Usages/References (LSP)")
      "cb" '(xref-go-back :which-key "Back (Pop Mark)")
      ;; -----------------------
      ;; ggtags (GNU Global): 适用于无 LSP 的大项目（Linux kernel、U-Boot 等）
      ;; 需要先在项目根目录运行 gtags -v 生成索引
      ;; -----------------------
      "gd" 'ggtags-find-definition
      "gr" 'ggtags-find-reference
      "gs" 'ggtags-find-symbol
      
      
      ;; -----------------------
      ;; Flymake 相关命令
      ;; -----------------------
      "fe" 'flymake-show-buffer-diagnostics  ;; 显示当前 buffer 的诊断信息
      "fn" 'flymake-goto-next-error         ;; 跳转到下一个错误
      "fp" 'flymake-goto-prev-error         ;; 跳转到上一个错误
      
      ;; -----------------------
      ;; Rustic 相关命令
      ;; -----------------------
      "rr" 'rustic-cargo-run             ;; 运行 cargo 项目
      "rt" 'rustic-cargo-test            ;; 运行 cargo 测试
      "rk" 'rustic-cargo-check           ;; 运行 cargo 检查
      "rl" 'rustic-cargo-clippy          ;; 运行 cargo clippy
      "rf" 'rustic-format-buffer         ;; 格式化当前 buffer
      
      ;; -----------------------
      ;; Python 相关命令
      ;; -----------------------
      "pe" 'python-shell-send-buffer     ;; 发送当前 buffer 到 Python REPL
      "ps" 'python-shell-send-statement  ;; 发送当前语句到 Python REPL
      "pf" 'python-shell-send-file       ;; 运行 Python 脚本
      
      )
    )

  (setq ggtags-completing-read-function #'completing-read)
  ;;提供一个更一致的补全体验，尤其是在你已经使用其他补全框架（如 company-mode 或 corfu）时

  (general-def 'normal
    "C-r" 'recentf
    "M-." 'xref-find-definitions
    "M-," 'xref-go-back
    )

#+end_src

** Which Key 
which-key is a minor mode for Emacs that displays the key bindings following
your currently entered incomplete command (a prefix) in a popup.
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  (use-package which-key
    :straight t
    :config
    (which-key-mode)  ;; Enable which-key
    (setq which-key-idle-delay 0.3)  ;; Show keybinding hints after a short delay
    ;;(setq which-key-popup-type 'side-window)  ;; Display keybindings in a side window (other options: 'mini-window)
    ;;(setq which-key-side-window-location 'right)  ;; Position the popup on the right side of the screen
    ;; side-window cause running timer error
    (setq which-key-max-description-length 30)  ;; Max length for descriptions in the popup
    (setq which-key-min-display-lines 10)  ;; Show at least 10 lines in the popup
    (setq which-key-show-early-on-C-h t)  ;; Show keybindings as soon as you press `C-h`
  )
#+end_src



* Org Mode
** Format Org File
#+begin_src emacs-lisp
  (require 'org-tempo)
  (setq-default fill-column 80)
  (add-hook 'org-mode-hook 'turn-on-auto-fill)

#+end_src
